feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Why do white men have such tiny penises compared to their black counterparts?

They're the stereotypical green hair, mulletish, dyke with hucow tits a binder can't even hold down, my other fwb is a 6'5 Dad bod man, and he's the one who originally brought it up. entry.title: /o/ Auto: Buell Blast
entry.content: For whatever merits they do or don't have (I read mixed opinions between it being a disgrace the name that vibrates harder than a hitachi on idle or just uncomplicated fun hated on for reasons that aren't relevant anymore). Either way, these 500cc taint ticklers are consistently something like $800 less than a Ninja 250 on my local listings. Is worth considering one fresh out of the MSF course for $1200? It feels like consistently the cheapest "smaller" bike near me that isn't some decrepit unre

entry.content: I got school shooting allegations and idk what will happen. I'm always chillin alone in school and there are a lot of dumbass kids coming up to me talking bs because of it. They ask me like twice a week if I'll shoot up the school and usually I say no but a few days ago I said yes for the first time. It was a joke obviously, they were laughing with me, so they definitely know, I also said jokingly that they're going to be the first ones I'll get. The thing is, right after lunch break they went t

entry.title: /int/ International: This always triggers me, when I see this. Splitting up Ulster like this was a mi…
entry.content: This always triggers me, when I see this. Splitting up Ulster like this was a mistake. And the aesthetic nightmare it created on maps in the end doesn't mean anything in the end, because Catholics have higher birth rates and will eventually vote to join Ireland anyway, unless something unexpected happens with mass migration shenanigans.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What's the use case for the NPU in new mobile processors like the AMD Ryzen™ AI …
entry.content: What's the use case for the NPU in new mobile processors like the AMD Ryzen™ AI 9 HX 470? From what I've read online, these can be used to generate about ~30 tokens per second for a 7b parameter model. What I would like to know if they can be used for generating images too and how good are they at that? if at all. Specs says: >Overall TOPS > Up to 86 TOPS >NPU TOPS > Up to 55 TOPS Anyone has one of these and can enlighten us about the use cases?

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: /dag/ - Dhurandhar Appreciation General
entry.content: You've never heard of this before edition. FAQ >wtf is Dhurandhar? It's something like the Citizen Vigilante of India, but actually good. Think Death Wish meets James Bond meets The Godfather, but everyone is brown. It's also extremely offensive to Muslims and racist against every single ethnicity in Pakistan. >What does Dhurandhar mean? It literally means 'Gigachad' in chanspeak, and applies to the protagonist. >Is the protagonist Jewish? No, he's Punjabi Sikh (Aryan). >Does he have his own the

entry.title: /b/ Random: I am a 20-year-old Indigenous from South America. It's been some years now that …
entry.content: I am a 20-year-old Indigenous from South America. It's been some years now that I have been an advocate for my people's rights. Many people here in latinamerica worship white people, for years I have harbored this resentment and hatred toward them, a feeling shared by many of us. I even went as far as to convince some of my peers to think like this. We are second-class citizens in our own countries, we get the worse treatment, our language is dying and no one cares. I realized this a long time a

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I want some people's second opinion on this, cause idk if I'm onto something or …
entry.content: I want some people's second opinion on this, cause idk if I'm onto something or just being stupid. Was the internet of the 2000s filled with fake enlightened centrist who revealed their true colors when Trump first got elected. Because I can't help but feel that's the case. It would explain why so many online personalities who were one extremely edgy are now openly left leaning and disavowed their old ways.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >Don't overclock or play gaymes now that I'm a decrepit 30 year old >CPUs so goo…
entry.content: >Don't overclock or play gaymes now that I'm a decrepit 30 year old >CPUs so good now to the point where you don't need a crazy TDP to be powerful How fucking stupid would it be for me to start using laptops as my main computer? I like having hard drives inside the computer, but maybe having my backups external would be easier when I swap the computer out if it becomes dated, I also wouldn't have to build PCs anymore, just go to the store and buy something high end, plop it on my desk or a stand

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: I feel like I'm going insane On the surface, my life is going well. I'm going to…
entry.content: I feel like I'm going insane On the surface, my life is going well. I'm going to college, I've been building my portfolio for years But all these years, I've been alone I've been coping with it as much as I can, I created a social media account to just talk about my life as if I was talking to a real person Sometimes I even talk about my day in 4chan threads But I'm still alone! Hahaha My mom used to get drunk. She vented all her problems to me when I was a kid, and I thought she changed, I real

entry.title: /g/ Technology: The Booble is Pooping
entry.content: >Blackstone mysterious pulls out of a trio of data centers after completion >the largest of the data centers uses 96 MW of electricity, which is the equivalent of powering ~100,000 homes What's happening? The US was slated to build hundreds of data centers over the next couple of years. But now, they're being stopped? What happens to the billions sunk into the already completed, as well as nearing completion data centers? What happened to the people who were evicted from the land their families

entry.content: >/CCG/, thermostat temp is different than coolant temp edition >For Classics made from 1979 or older, with few exceptions. >Everybody has their own taste, but some tastes are wrong. If you aren't sure if your car is classic or not, it's not. >Your Honda Miata doesn't belong here. >US, Euro, Jap, or whatever. >Post your classic, your work on it, your hackery, and get advice. >Any and all discussion about classics welcome, but may not necessarily generate responses; don't get butthurt. >Period cor

entry.title: /int/ International: Is he really the only one to blame?
entry.content: https://youtu.be/g5XZ3JPgFs4&t=483 Look closely. Those "victims" didn't even try to avoid him either. In Japan, when a street is narrow or crowded, you're not supposed to walk side-by-side with someone else, so you don't bump into people coming from the opposite direction. By the way, when I was about 20 years old, I did the exact same thing to a group of white men. They were walking side-by-side towards me, occupying the full width of the sidewalk. One of them and I collided head-on. I braced m
